title: Subscription
description: A subscription routing change notifications and messages to an external message queue destination.

version.description: Current version for optimistic concurrency control.

destination.description: The external message queue destination configuration.

messages.description: Message type subscriptions filtering which message types to deliver.

changes.description: Change subscriptions filtering which resource change events to deliver.

status.description: Current health status of the subscription.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the subscription was created.

lastModifiedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the subscription was last modified.
